what_it_does: Records a channel-memory attachment entry that links an attachment identifier to an image resource located at image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-13.
observations: The file consists entirely of YAML frontmatter metadata.
The target field uses an image:// URI pointing to design-source/pitch-deck/p-13.
There is no body content or embedded code.
standouts: The target is a URI-schemed pointer to a pitch-deck image (page 13).
It functions as a typed ledger record for a design-source channel attachment.
conventions: Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added.
Target value uses an image:// URI scheme.
notes: A minimal metadata stub that catalogs an image attachment pointing to pitch-deck page 13 in the design-source channel.
questions: What visual content is on pitch-deck page p-13?
Who or what process created this attachment?
Is this attachment referenced by a specific channel message or design artifact?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to be an attachment metadata record and it does exactly that: it identifies and points to an image asset.
intention_signals: It seems intended to create a durable, typed reference from a channel-memory attachment ID to a specific image asset in the design-source pitch deck.
contribution: Provides a stable attachment identifier and a typed pointer to an image asset, supporting retrieval and cross-referencing of design-source pitch-deck image p-13.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record identifying an image attachment that targets image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-13 in the design-source channel.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and point to a specific pitch-deck image asset within the design-source channel memory.
